layout.heroDescription: Start your group collaboration journey with unparalleled security.

landing.heroSubtitle: Experience a kinetic curation of digital space. Precision engineered for the minimalist mind.
landing.featuresSubtitle: We've redefined the boundary between function and form. Every interaction is weighted with purpose.

features.title: Kinetic Curation
features.desc: Intelligence that adapts to your workflow, surfacing what matters precisely when you need it.

features.title: Absolute Security
features.desc: Encrypted at every touchpoint. Your data remains your sanctuary, protected by industry-leading protocols.

features.title: Instant Velocity
features.desc: Zero latency transitions and hyper-responsive controls that match the speed of your creative thought.

bento.title: Master the Flow
bento.desc: Every element of PLEN is designed to disappear, leaving only your work in sharp focus.
bento.editorialDesc: Typography-first design that honors the hierarchy of information above all else.

journal.title: Daily Journal
journal.desc: Reflect on your day and track your emotional health.
journal.question: How are you feeling today?
journal.historyDesc: You have recorded {count} entries in the last 7 days.
prompts: What was the best part of your day?
What is one thing you learned today?
What are you grateful for right now?
What challenged you today and how did you handle it?
What is one goal for tomorrow?
What do you want to remember about today in a year?

about.title: ABOUT PLEN
about.subtitle: The Story Behind a Student's Chaotic Schedule

story.title: Born from 20-Year-Old Struggles
story.p1: Being a 20-year-old college student is tough. Between piling assignments, time-consuming organization meetings, and future ambitions that often cause anxiety—life feels like a tangled mess that's hard to unravel.
story.p2: PLEN was born not just as lines of code, but as an escape from my own chaotic schedule. I needed something more than just a calendar; I needed an assistant that understands how precious every minute is amidst overwhelming busyness.
story.p3: Created with the spirit of helping fellow 'busyness warriors', PLEN is here to bring calm amidst your storm of activities. Let's organize life, one premium step at a time.

about.missionText: Empowering individuals to reach their maximum potential through smart, aesthetic, and AI-driven life organization.
